name: My claim denied for light duty refusal in Centerville, now what?

mainEntity.name: My claim denied for light duty refusal in Centerville, now what?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal if duty improper; attend hearing.[2][4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Refusal justifies denial if appropriate; appeal if restrictions ignored.[2] Show employer violated limits.[2] Key factors: one IME usually; cooperate. Hearing proves case.[4] Lawyer negotiates.

description: Appeal if duty improper; attend hearing.[2][4]
